title: DriftGuard Consumer Profile
description: Pinned ingress contract for validate(payload, profile). Structural validation only — see semantic-drift-boundary.md.

profileKind.description: ingress: validate full payload (default). llm_structured_output: validate LLM JSON object output. tool_call_envelope: extract inner object from MCP/A2A/OpenAI tool-call shape before validating against schema.

envelope.description: When profileKind is tool_call_envelope, selects which nested object to validate. preset mcp: { name, arguments } or { tool, input }; openai_functions: { function: { name, arguments } }; raw: use extractPath dot path (e.g. arguments, input, function.arguments).

extractPath.description: Dot path into payload when preset is raw.

schema.description: JSON Schema draft 2020-12 subset (types, required, properties, enum, min/max). Local #/ $ref only in v1.

watchUrl.description: Documentation-only link to upstream watch; no auto-fetch on validate hot path.
